description:
During an emergency response mobilization, consolidate specific quantities of loose medical supplies from `WH/Stock` into exactly three trackable mixed pallets (Packages) in the `WH/Stock/Rapid Deployment` zone. Ensure no loose stock remains in the Rapid Deployment location and exactly three packages are created matching these manifests:

Pallet Alpha:
- 200 units of "Med-Syringe 10ml"
- 100 units of "Med-Saline 500ml"
- 400 units of "Med-Bandage Roll"

Pallet Beta:
- 300 units of "Med-Syringe 10ml"
- 100 units of "Med-Saline 500ml"
- 600 units of "Med-Bandage Roll"

Pallet Gamma:
- 800 units of "Med-Gauze Pads 4x4"
- 600 units of "Med-Surgical Gloves Size M"
- 600 units of "Med-Surgical Gloves Size L"

natural_language.prompt: During an emergency response mobilization, consolidate specific quantities of loose medical supplies from `WH/Stock` into exactly three trackable mixed pallets (Packages), moving them to the `WH/Stock/Rapid Deployment` zone. First, enable the Packages feature in Inventory Settings. Then, transfer and pack the items into exactly three distinct Packages. Pallet Alpha needs 200 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, and 400 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Beta needs 300 Med-Syringe 10ml, 100 Med-Saline 500ml, and 600 Med-Bandage Roll. Pallet Gamma needs 800 Med-Gauze Pads 4x4, 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size M, and 600 Med-Surgical Gloves Size L. Ensure no loose stock remains in the Rapid Deployment location.
